subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! God reward thee on Our behalf with the most excellent of rewards and lead thee unto that which thou lovest and with which thou art well-pleased. We testify that thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رضا قد جزاک الله عنا خیر الجزا و یبلغک الی ما انت تحب و ترضی نشهد بانک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wisdom [hikmat]
